---
title: "v7a_swin"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Description

Window-attention model designed to test whether local attention is better suited to ocean residuals than global attention.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Architecture | Swin-style FM backbone |
| Objective | residual Flow Matching |
| Attention | local windows |
| Motivation | eddies and fronts are mostly local structures |
| Research inspiration | Swin Transformer, local attention downscaling |

## Variables

::: {.panel-tabset}
### thetao
::: {.figure-grid}
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR / CNO / CNO+FM
`assets/figures/v7a_swin/thetao/presentation.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR-LR / CNO Residual / FM Residual
`assets/figures/v7a_swin/thetao/residuals.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### CNO Error / FM Error
`assets/figures/v7a_swin/thetao/errors.png`
:::
:::
### so
`assets/figures/v7a_swin/so/`
### zos
`assets/figures/v7a_swin/zos/`
### uo
`assets/figures/v7a_swin/uo/`
### vo
`assets/figures/v7a_swin/vo/`
:::

## Metrics

`assets/metrics/v7a_swin.csv`
